title: APT37 (Famous Chollima) - Operation HanKook Phantom Defense

steps.title: Spear-phishing with malicious decoy documents
steps.text: APT37 sends targeted spear-phishing emails containing malicious decoy documents (HWP, PDF, LNK files) such as 'National Intelligence Research Society Newsletter' to South Korean academics, think tanks, and energy/security associations
steps.description: APT37 sends targeted spear-phishing emails containing malicious decoy documents (HWP, PDF, LNK files) such as 'National Intelligence Research Society Newsletter' to South Korean academics, think tanks, and energy/security associations

steps.title: Initial payload execution via LNK files
steps.text: Malicious LNK files are executed on victim systems, initiating the infection chain and preparing for malware deployment
steps.description: Malicious LNK files are executed on victim systems, initiating the infection chain and preparing for malware deployment

steps.title: PowerShell-based infection chain deployment
steps.text: The attack leverages PowerShell scripts to execute the infection chain, downloading and installing the RokRat backdoor on compromised systems
steps.description: The attack leverages PowerShell scripts to execute the infection chain, downloading and installing the RokRat backdoor on compromised systems

steps.title: RokRat backdoor installation and persistence
steps.text: RokRat malware is installed with persistence mechanisms including scheduled tasks, registry modifications, and remote management tools to maintain long-term access
steps.description: RokRat malware is installed with persistence mechanisms including scheduled tasks, registry modifications, and remote management tools to maintain long-term access
steps.detectionHints: Monitor for T1053.005, T1112, T1219 indicators

steps.title: Cloud-based C2 communication establishment
steps.text: The malware establishes encrypted command and control communications using compromised cloud services including Dropbox, Yandex, and pCloud for data exfiltration and remote control
steps.description: The malware establishes encrypted command and control communications using compromised cloud services including Dropbox, Yandex, and pCloud for data exfiltration and remote control
steps.detectionHints: Monitor for T1071.001, T1567.002, T1573.001 indicators

steps.title: Data collection and exfiltration
steps.text: Sensitive data is collected from compromised systems and exfiltrated through the established cloud-based C2 infrastructure to support DPRK espionage objectives
steps.description: Sensitive data is collected from compromised systems and exfiltrated through the established cloud-based C2 infrastructure to support DPRK espionage objectives
steps.detectionHints: Monitor for T1005, T1041, T1567.002 indicators
